verdict.answer_first: Tie: both answer in sentence 1; A says "default to a platform" and B says "default to a platform like Render or Fly".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits slightly harder with "My concrete pick: start on Fly or Render"; A is also clear but spends more space surveying trade-offs.
verdict.fabrication: Both give unsupported price examples; A: "$5–8/mo Hetzner box", B: "€5–6/mo Hetzner box".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on: "start on Fly or Render" plus clear VPS exceptions.
